label: Pawn table
description: Defines a pawn management table — a multi-column grid used on tabs such as Assign, Restrict, Work, and Animals.

columns.label: Columns
columns.description: Ordered list of PawnColumnDefs shown in this table. List entries support MayRequire for DLC-conditional columns.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# PawnTable subclass that implements this table's layout and row logic. Defaults to PawnTable.

minWidth.label: Min width
minWidth.description: Minimum pixel width the table is rendered at. Default 998.

basic-table.label: Basic table
basic-table.description: A minimal pawn table with a label and a list of columns.
